title: Timesheet Approval Workflow (Non-App based)
excerpt: Can anyone provide me with a solid overview of how the time tracking column can be used in a timesheet approval workflow? No automations appear to interact with this column to even move it to another board that can organ…

posts.author: Ronan_Kelly (Ronan Kelly)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can anyone provide me with a solid overview of how the time tracking column can be used in a timesheet approval workflow? No automations appear to interact with this column to even move it to another board that can organize the submissions separately.

Note: I’m not interested in hearing about app recommendations nor app developers on this.
